channel.title: Monerica - Newest and Sponsored Listings
channel.description: The latest additions and sponsors in our directory.

item.title: ✅ xChange.me (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No kyc instant exchange since 2017. Tor mirror, CLI client, fully anonymous, private and safe. - Contact: @xchange_me_

item.title: Label Drop
item.description: Businesses > Postage & Shipping Services : No KYC fill in your shipment details, and receive your approved prepaid shipping label with all duties paid. End to end labels are issued through active business accounts. - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: https://t.me/droplabel#

item.title: CypherGoat SimpleX Chat Bot
item.description: Exchanges > Bots : Non-custodial crypto swap aggregator via SimpleX Chat. Swap BTC, XMR, ETH and many more across 20+ exchange partners with no account, no KYC, and no IP logging. Monero-first.

item.title: XMR Plinko
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : No KYC. No bullshit. No accounts. Drop the ball, win Monero. Provably fair Plinko you can verify yourself, so bring your own wallet and send it. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: info@xmrplinko.com

item.title: ❓ Mistex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Privacy-first cryptocurrency exchange Without Limits. No KYC. No logs. No signup process. 400+ XMR Pairs with Instant Processing. Trade using Telegram Bot - @mistex_bot 1-2% FEE / 24/7 - Note: misrepresented swap totals on site, may use CEX for some routes, lied to users - Contact: https://mistex.io/contact

item.title: ❓ Expeer
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast, secure, and fully automated crypto-to-crypto exchange. No registration required. Non-custodial instant swaps with competitive rates. - Note: Emails aren’t sending - Contact: @Ex_peer

item.title: xmr.club
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : No-KYC services for the Monero economy

item.title: IR Eyewear
item.description: Businesses > Clothing, Apparel & Accessories : Makes infrared-blocking glasses for people who take their privacy seriously. - Processor: Direct To Wallet - Contact: shop@ireyewear.com Signal: @IReyewear.01

item.title: ✅ Coincards (sponsored)
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : Gift cards from hundreds of top brands, including Amazon, Walmart, Airbnb, Uber, DoorDash, Home Depot, and even Visa or Amex cards, with values up to $2,000. - Location: Surrey, B.C. - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: ❓ GhostSwap.app
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A privacy-focused crypto swap platform built to simplify cross-chain asset exchange - Note: Possible attempt at impersonation of existing GhostSwap service. Listed "partners" have no association with project, highly suspicious. - Location: Berlin - Processor: Custom - Contact: techaddict0x

item.title: Ping192
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Delivers elite red teaming, adversary emulation, and penetration testing services. Authorized offensive security for organizations that have more complex requests. - Location: New York

item.title: Monero Space - Blockchain Explorer
item.description: Utilities > Blockchain Explorers : A fork of mempool.space retargeted to Monero. It surfaces what the chain alone proves — height, hashrate, mempool, fee tiers, ring information, RingCT type — and stops there.

item.title: Skytelecom.io
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : SMS and VoIP infrastructure for global teams. Allow customers to make international calls and send global sms freely with no restrictions. - Processor: Custom - Contact: @skytelecom_io on telegram

item.title: Whirlpool Observer
item.description: Non-Profits > Miscellaneous : An open-source tool that can be run by anyone. It scans Bitcoin's open distributed ledger (the blockchain) to identify complex transactional patterns - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: ✅ Malad Valley Marathon
item.description: Businesses > Fitness : The first marathon to accept XMR directly for entry fees. Run through the scenic and historic Malad Valley. Established in 1884, it is one of Idaho's oldest towns. - Note: race on September 12, 2026, sponsored by Monerica - Location: Malad City, Idaho - Processor: Monero Gateway

item.title: KycNotList
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : A No KYC / No AML crypto exchanger and mixer monitor for users who value privacy, transparency, and safer swaps. - Contact: kycnotlist@proton.me

item.title: ❓ XMRMatters
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : A privacy-first, desktop-optimized P2P exchange built from scratch to restore surveillance-free Monero trading with zero KYC and hardened escrow. - Note: Uses stagenet. - Processor: Custom - Contact: @XMRMatters

item.title: ❓ Hire a Hacker Pro
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Providing professional services since 2008 such as asset recovery, offensive tactical cybersecurity, mobile data extraction and more. - Note: claims to be from 2008, but domain register in 2019 - Location: Phoenix, AZ - Contact: @tonycapo Telegram

item.title: ❌ Btc Bullions
item.description: Businesses > Precious Metals : Marketplace for buying certified physical precious metals — shipped discreetly to your door worldwide. - Note: Falsified registration date and uses fake Trustpilot reviews on their site to seem credible. - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: Daylight Freedom
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : We expose the technocracy taking your money, your health, your speech, and your privacy.

item.title: ipay24
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : We make cryptocurrency exchanges simple and straightforward, minimizing the number of steps so you can receive your funds quickly and conveniently. - Contact: t.me/ipay24ex

item.title: Accrescent
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : A novel Android app store focused on security, privacy, and usability. - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: ✅ Strike (sponsored)
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : High performance VPS hosting. Servers available in Poland, USA, and Singapore. - Note: Doesn’t verify invoice data - Location: USA Texas; NJ, Poland, Singapore - Processor: Trocador - Contact: support@strike.bz

item.title: Monero Order Book
item.description: Exchanges > Miscellaneous : BTC/ XMR order book for decentralized exchanges

item.title: ✅ GhostSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous Crypto Exchange – No KYC Crypto Swap. 1,600+ supported coins, a fast, private, and hassle-free way to exchange crypto on your own terms. - Contact: https://t.me/GhostSwap1

item.title: ❓ Jink Host
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : High-performance Proxmox VPS hosting, dedicated servers & cloud storage with AMD Ryzen, EPYC & Intel Xeon hardware in USA & Europe. Budget VPS from $0.99/mo. - Note: Appears to be using nulled/pirated WHMCS which may not be secure or up to date. Doesn’t correspond using official domain. - Processor: Heleket - Contact: admin@jink.host | @JinkHost_Admin Telegram | @Jink Discord

item.title: ✅ SageSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Never KYC, No AML, No Login, and No JavaScript. Fast and private swap service. - Note: 1-2% FEE | 24/7 - Contact: https://SageSwap.io/Support

item.title: Opt Out
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : Privacy focused podcast

item.title: monero.you
item.description: Communities > Forums : A Lemmy instance for Monero community - Contact: admin@monero.you

item.title: Crypto Agorism
item.description: Media > Miscellaneous : Free markets for a free world - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: ❌ Red Mercury Vault
item.description: Businesses > Miscellaneous : A premier, research-driven materials enterprise operating at the forefront of advanced energy substrates and high-density catalytic compounds within the Industrial Sector. - Note: Red mercury is a discredited substance, most likely a hoax perpetrated by con artists who sought to take advantage of gullible buyers on the black market for arms.

item.title: PikaSim
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Travel eSIMs for 190+ countries. No account, email, name, address, or ID required. Web-based with mobile apps for iOS and Android. Anonymous top-ups via ICCID or order number. - Note: Monero accepted natively (not converted). - Location: Denver, CO - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: @PikaSim_esim

item.title: Fsky
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Instances of frontend services

item.title: sshwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Exchange crypto from your terminal - Note: uses ChangeNow API

item.title: Roboex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A cryptocurrency exchange service that provides users with access to the latest digital asset exchange options on favorable terms. - Processor: Custom - Contact: https://t.me/Roboex_exchange, https://t.me/RoboEX_Exchange_bot

item.title: Stock Enthusiasts
item.description: Businesses > Membership : Group buy: access to top paid investing groups & newsletters for a fraction of the original price - Location: Berlin - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: https://t.me/dedmoroz911

item.title: Cloudzy
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : AI-ready cloud servers on the latest AMD EPYC and pure NVMe. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: ✅ Silent Exchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast & Anonymous Crypto to Crypto Swaps. No email. No KYC.Trade-in Minutes. 1500+ Crypto Pairs 24/7/365 Service Fee starting from 1%. - Note: Trade using Telegram Bot - @silentexchangerobot - Contact: Telegram: @silentexchange Email: silentexchange@protonmail.com

item.title: Monero Stats
item.description: Media > Miscellaneous : An aggregate of payment usage data released by businesses that accept Monero.

item.title: MoneroWire
item.description: Media > News (English) : Financial privacy news for people who think it matters.

item.title: Privata
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Exchange crypto across 50+ providers. Sort by KYC, rate, speed, or fee, and pick what matters to you.

item.title: The Rage
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : An independent publication covering financial surveillance. Privacy is not a crime.

item.title: Disroot
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : A platform providing online services based on principles of freedom, privacy, federation and decentralization. Email and file storage.

item.title: Monero Deutschsprachig
item.description: Communities > SimpleX : Monero German-Speaking SimpleX group

item.title: ❓ Miradex
item.description: Exchanges > Decentralized Exchanges : Swap Across 50+ blockchains via Atomic Swap, THORChain, Chainflip, and Near-Intents all without KYC - Note: User reported slow protocol with refund due to beta bug, or possibly only being refunded due to escalation. - Contact: https://t.me/superuser

item.title: crocuda_vps
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : A VPS provider accessible from your terminal. No registration form. You only need a key. -> `ssh crocuda.com`

item.title: Escrow0
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : Protects buyers and sellers with a simple flow: lock funds, verify delivery, then release securely. - Contact: https://X.com/trinaldao

item.title: KingSMTP.com
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Fast, private, and reliable SMTP for businesses. No KYC required. Up and running in 2 minutes.

item.title: ❌ EasyCCV
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : No KYC Virtual prepaid Mastercard Card. Apple Pay supported. - Note: report of scam and bad card number - Processor: Custom

item.title: 0trace
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant private cryptocurrency exchange service. Built for fast cross-network exchange with no logs and tracking. - Processor: Custom - Contact: https://x.com/notifications

item.title: WTF is XMR?
item.description: Education > Guides : Complete Monero Privacy Guide

item.title: LibreGuide
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : The guide to independent news. - Processor: MoneroPay

item.title: Diyar Ciftci Node
item.description: Nodes > Public Remote Nodes & Operators : Public Monero node. - Contact: diyarciftci@protonmail.com

item.title: OzPeps
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Research-grade peptides for Australian researchers. COA-verified products including BPC-157, GHK-Cu, MOTS-C, Retatrutide and more. Express Post shipping. XMR payment no KYC - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: support@ozpeps.is

item.title: Shadowdesk.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial swap aggregator routing assets through Monero (XMR) to enhance transaction privacy. - Note: disable Shadow Route for XMR swap

item.title: RetaLABS
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Australian-owned online store supplying research-grade lyophilised peptides to researchers and laboratories. Ships Australia-wide via Express Post. - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: support@retalabs.is

item.title: ProBiller
item.description: Merchant Services > Integrations : A secure online payment solution handling millions of transactions for innovative businesses around the world every month. - Location: 96-197 Old Nicosia-Limassol Road, Dali Industrial Zone 2540, Block 1

item.title: Ava Holyass
item.description: Businesses > Pornography & Adult Products : Official adult videos, themed collections, direct bundles and private delivery. - Processor: Custom

item.title: ❌ GrifHost.com
item.description: Web Hosting > Domain Registration & DNS Services : We offer high-quality and affordable web hosting, domain registration, email marketing services (SMTP), and RDPs. We don't require any kind of KYC verification. - Note: report of scam domain registration

item.title: Minimal.Blog
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Get your own minimal blog online in seconds, no complicated setup, no ads, no distractions, just blogging.

item.title: Mukhost
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : A UK-based hosting company committed to delivering powerful, secure, and affordable hosting service. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: Monero Avg. Transaction Fee historical chart
item.description: Utilities > Transactions : Average transaction fee, USD

item.title: PriEco
item.description: Non-Profits > Search Engines : Fair general purpose web search engine - Contact: @PriEcoSearch

item.title: DNSProxy
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : DDoS protection - Location: Buenos Aires, 9821, Dupler - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: Get Rate
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Сryptocurrency exchange monitor that helps you find the best rates for buying and selling digital currency.

item.title: CryptoZapravka
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Service for fast and secure exchange of electronic currencies.

item.title: Qubicall
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : International phone calls at a fraction of the carrier's price. - Processor: OxaPay

item.title: Monero Merchant
item.description: Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : FOSS Monero Point of Sale (POS) Android App - Contact: https://github.com/ajs-xmr

item.title: Monero Coalition
item.description: Non-Profits > Activism : Group dedicated to advancing the adoption of Monero.

item.title: XMRpriced
item.description: Finance > Price Display : A browser extension that displays XMR prices alongside USD on any online store. Shop with a Monero mindset.

item.title: MoodSIM
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Buy, scan, connect - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: disapeer
item.description: Exchanges > Messenger : A privacy-preserving on and offramp which connects to wallets.

item.title: Call Me HEMP
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Federally Legal Cannabis – Ships Discreetly. All of our products are federally legal. - Note: Save 50% off at checkout with Monero - Location: 65 Merrimon Ave #1004, Asheville NC 28801 - Processor: MyCryptoCheckout - Contact: support@callmehemp.com

item.title: xmr-shop.eth
item.description: Businesses > Proxy Shopping : Buy anything & Pay with Monero. Thousands of products: electronics, laptops, phones audiobooks & more. No accounts, no tracking, no middlemen. Fully private. - Contact: https://xmr-shop.eth.limo/#/contact

item.title: Monero.Software
item.description:
Freelancers > Software Developers : I am Nolan, providing affordable development service for community.
Hourly rate is 15$/h ~ 0.045 XMR/h - Note: If you are NGO, we can discuss about rate. - Location: South East Asia - ICT (UTC+7) Timezone - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: Email: hi@monero.software

item.title: ❓ Secrex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No KYC, No AML modern cryptocurrency exchange service designed with a focus on convenience, anonymity, transparency, and operational stability. - Note: Suspicious review cadence - Contact: https://t.me/secret_ex

item.title: Navi Land
item.description: Businesses > Email Providers/ Forwarders : A stable, private email service. We don't track you, we don't sell your data, and we don't annoy you with ads. We provide standard email (IMAP/SMTP) that just works.

item.title: ❓ MoneroFlow
item.description:
Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : Comprehensive Monero POS and accounting System. Fully Open Source. XMR referral rewards system.
Accept Monero Instantly, without giving up custody. - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: https://docs.moneroflow.com/wiki.html

item.title: ✅ Anon Raffle
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Monero based raffle with provably fair draws, low fees, and prizes including XMR payouts & firearms. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: https://x.com/anon_raffle

item.title: ✅ MoneroShameList.com
item.description: Other Directories > Miscellaneous : Companies that market themselves as privacy-focused but refuse to accept Monero — the only truly private money. - Note: Sponsored by Monerica

item.title: BTC Burger
item.description: Finance > Conversion : Compares different cryptocurrencies to commodities like burgers to see how many you can get for 1 unit

item.title: PrivacyOpSec
item.description: Businesses > Electronics/ Computer Hardware : Crypto store for OpSec and Security gadgets - Note: 5% Monero discount

item.title: Swapzilla
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Crypto swap aggregator that compares rates across multiple exchangers instantly. Enter the amount, see the best rate, and swap directly from your wallet. No registration. - Contact: https://x.com/swapzilla_io

item.title: XMR Land
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Discover wallets, exchanges, mining tools, and services powering the Monero ecosystem.

item.title: tomboi.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Create an exchange request in one form, no JavaScript required.

item.title: Monero SuperPay
item.description: Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : Self-hosted, privacy-first point of sale. Accept Monero payments at any business.

item.title: YT-DLP online
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Download videos from various websites using yt-dlp command-line tool in browsers.

item.title: Mobit
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast, Secure, No KYC, No JS, No Logs.

item.title: IsItKYC
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : Check any crypto exchange. See whether it requires KYC before you sign up.

item.title: ❓ monero-web
item.description: Wallets > Web Wallets : Non-custodial web wallet with client-side transaction signing. Keys never leave the browser. Supports seed phrases, spend/view keys, and view-only mode. - Note: Self-hostable. SHA-256 file verification page included. - Contact: @Medtabka on GitHub

item.title: MixSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Crypto Swap Exchange No KYC - Contact: support@mixswap.org

item.title: ❌ NoData Hosting Solutions
item.description: Web Hosting > Offshore & Privacy-Focused Hosting : Privacy-focused hosting solutions with offshore locations and absolute data protection. - Note: Scammers are pretending to be customer updates. Does not process orders. - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: admin@nodata.pw

item.title: ✅ MoneroMarketCap
item.description: Finance > Market Cap Comparision : Crypto market capitalization priced in Monero with portfolio management. - Note: Built by Monerica

item.title: ❓ MoneroIndex.com
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Directory of Monero friendly business - Note: promotes questionable listings which were disallowed to be sponsors on Monerica, likely connected to SolvoCard.com, AnonRefill.com and "Richard Fore"

item.title: AscendEX
item.description: Exchanges > Centralized Exchanges : Trading and earning platform.

item.title: LuxHost
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : Powerful Virtual Servers with 2 GBit/s network for any application. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: Ward's ACE & Country Store - Firearms
item.description: Businesses > Weapons & Self-Defense : A locally owned country store stocking 550+ firearms — pistols, revolvers, rifles, and shotguns from brands like Glock, Ruger, S&W, Sig Sauer, Henry, and Mossberg. - Note: 3% Monero discount - Location: 65 N 300 E Malad City - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: @wardsace

item.title: Peerz
item.description: Exchanges > Miscellaneous : Trade crypto in real life. Find people who want to trade in the map. Talk end-to-end encrypted, arrange meeting and transact fully offline. No KYC, free. - Note: No email, password. You need any web3 wallet to create your own offer and talk with other peers. - Location: Worldwide - Contact: @itspeerz on X.

item.title: DEX.fo
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Automatic cryptocurrency exchange. Zero KYC, zero AML, zero registration. No IP collection, no metadata logging. - Contact: https://smp16.simplex.im/a#1KxGbAL_XTN4X9NKJI8aIR91A2Dd4bSzo5rGraufqKU

item.title: custodial.fail
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Swap Cryptocurrencies

item.title: Symbiosis
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Swap cross-chain instantly. - Note: VPN access prohibited

item.title: UnCard
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Instant virtual cards

item.title: ❓ SolvoCard.com
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Get a No KYC debit card that works with Apple/Google Pay & 3DS Secure worldwide. Signup with only your email in seconds. - Note: Site advertises Apple Pay support, but card does not work with Apple Pay. Card country code is GB, not US. - Processor: Heleket - Contact: @solvocard on X

item.title: ❓ XMRVCC
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Privacy-first service offering disposable VCCs for XMR. No-KYC and zero personal info required. Secure your online footprint with untraceable payments. - Note: delivery over website and Telegram. - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: contact@xmrvcc.com

item.title: acechange.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous crypto exchange

item.title: Session
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : An end-to-end encrypted messenger that protects your private data. A decentralized app designed, built, and operated by a global community of privacy experts. - Note: Donate via silent donor.

item.title: ✅ CypherGoat (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Non-custodial swap aggregator for private crypto exchanges. Find the best rate across trusted providers and swap instantly. - Location: Sweden

item.title: ✅ Wagyu.xyz (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Seamlessly bridge assets between Monero and Hyperliquid with Wagyu. Private Cross-Chain Bridge. The first decentralized orderbook exchange supporting native XMR deposits. - Note: US & UAE citizens are not welcome in using any Wagyu products. - Contact: https://t.me/PerpetualCow

item.title: ✅ MoneroDice (sponsored)
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Simple, fast, privacy-respecting dice and blackjack game. Provably fair mode for dice is available too. - Contact: contact [at] monerodice.pro

item.title: ✅ Cake Wallet (sponsored)
item.description: Wallets > Mobile Wallets : Allows you to safely store, send, receive, and exchange your XMR, BTC, and LTC (and exchange other currencies) - Location: United States

item.title: ✅ CCE Cash (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : This is a fully automated service that allows you to quickly exchange various cryptocurrencies such as XMR, BTC, ETH, and SOL without requiring identity verification. - Contact: https://x.com/Cce_Cash
